title: Elytranthe dictyophleba
taxonomy: Elytranthe dictyophleba is classified within the family Lamiaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the mint family. This plant is further classified in the genus Elytranthe, which contains several species of flowering plants native to the tropical regions of Asia. The classification of Elytranthe dictyophleba is a part of the larger taxonomy of flowering plants, which is used to categorize and understand the relationships between different species. The classification is based on various characteristics, including the plant's morphology, anatomy, and molecular features. Understanding the classification of Elytranthe dictyophleba is essential for botanists and researchers to study and conserve this species.
